notes: CANONICAL rigged biped combat-unit template. Clone per unit: swap files.mesh for your biped (skinned to biped_v1, materials named head/torso/arms/legs) and keep animation_clips -- the clips target bone NAMES so one combat_biped_anim.json drives every biped. death playback=hold means its final frame is the non-animated corpse. bake_asset.py embeds the clips and bakes in one command.
